description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a modern, rectangular layout, featuring a flat roof and a combination of white and gray exterior walls. The front facade includes a garage, a small fenced garden with a tree, and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The backyard is enclosed with wooden and brick fencing, containing a grassy area and additional landscaping. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically along the sides and rear, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roofline is flat, and the structure is surrounded by a mix of hardscape and softscape elements, including planters and shrubs. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, garage, and landscaped front and back yards. Features large windows, fenced boundaries, and a clean, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, paved driveway, small fenced garden, and a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat roof, side windows, and wooden fencing along the property boundary.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with grassy area, planters, and large sliding glass doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional fencing, a large tree in the backyard, and more windows along the side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
